## Tasks namespace

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[TasksLibrary](./ts-chocolate.tasks.taskslibrary.md)


</td><td>

Multi-source task library with type-safe access

Wraps AggregatedResultMap to provide: - Composite ID access (e.g., "common.melt-chocolate") - Multi-source management (built-in, user, app-local, etc.) - Mutable vs immutable collection distinction - Weakly-typed validating access for external data


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

## Interfaces

<table><thead><tr><th>

Interface


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[IInlineTask](./ts-chocolate.tasks.iinlinetask.md)


</td><td>

An inline task defined directly in a procedure step. Contains a full ITaskData definition with a synthetic baseId (derived from procedure/step) plus params for rendering.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IRenderOptions](./ts-chocolate.tasks.irenderoptions.md)


</td><td>

Options for rendering procedure steps.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ITask](./ts-chocolate.tasks.itask.md)


</td><td>

A reusable task template with runtime-computed properties. Extends ITaskData with requiredVariables extracted from the template.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ITaskData](./ts-chocolate.tasks.itaskdata.md)


</td><td>

Persisted task data - the data model stored in YAML/JSON files. Does not include requiredVariables as those are extracted from the template at runtime.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ITaskRef](./ts-chocolate.tasks.itaskref.md)


</td><td>

Represents a step's reference to a reusable task with parameter values.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ITaskRefValidation](./ts-chocolate.tasks.itaskrefvalidation.md)


</td><td>

Result of validating a task reference against a task definition.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
